summary: Backend testing complete for Coin Connect. All 20 backend test cases pass against the external EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Verified auth (register/login/me), packs catalog, Razorpay order creation against live test API, payment signature verification (both invalid 400 and valid signature crediting coins idempotently), Agora RTC token generation, end-call coin deduction (10/min), insufficient coins 402, transactions and calls history, and exclusion of Mongo _id in all responses.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py end_call: signature uses `data: dict` instead of a Pydantic model (SpendCoinsIn defined but unused). Works but bypasses validation; consider switching to a model.
Razorpay create-order: any razorpay SDK exception is surfaced via 500 with raw exception string in detail; consider sanitizing error to avoid leaking internal details in production.
agora/token does not check for empty AGORA_APP_CERTIFICATE; verified via env so OK, but worth a startup assertion.
JWT_SECRET in .env labelled 'change-in-prod' — fine for test env, flag for production hardening.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_<uuid>@example.com users for isolation; primary smoke@test.com/pass1234 also verified via login.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional. Razorpay live test order creation works with provided keys. Signature verification using HMAC-SHA256 (order_id|payment_id, key=RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET) works. Agora token generation uses agora_token_builder.RtcTokenBuilder.buildTokenWithUid; returns app_id, channel, call_id. Coin economy: 50 welcome, 10/min call, capped to balance.  All endpoints under /api prefix and reachable via EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL.
